heading: Sense of Congress

children.text: the missions of the Bureau of Border Security and the Bureau of Citizenship and Immigration Services are equally important and, accordingly, they each should be adequately funded; and
the functions transferred under this part should not, after such transfers take effect, operate at levels below those in effect prior to .November 25, 2002
